## ContentFieldValue type

Scalar or array-element value accepted by a typed field search.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ContentFieldValue<TFrontmatter, TKey extends keyof TFrontmatter> = TFrontmatter[TKey] extends infer TValue ? TValue extends readonly (infer TItem)[] ? TItem : TValue : never;
```
